scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:shell: concurrently -n backend,shell -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm --workspace packages/shell run dev"
scripts.dev:legacy: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run preview:frontend"
scripts.preview:frontend: npm --workspace web/frontend run build && npm --workspace web/frontend run preview
scripts.test: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:regression
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:cbor: npm run test:cbor:odin && npm run test:mmt-cbor
scripts.check:mmt: node -e "const t=process.env.MMT_WS_TOKEN||require('fs').readFileSync('web/backend/.env','utf8').match(/^MMT_WS_TOKEN=(.+)$/m)?.[1]; console.log(t&&t.length>20?'MMT token present ('+t.slice(0,8)+'…)':'No MMT_WS_TOKEN — run: npm run setup:mmt')"
